intro: Between April 13 and April 19, 2026, ZCyberNews published 15 articles on privilege escalation. The coverage detailed 12 high, 2 critical, and 1 medium severity vulnerabilities, with the threat actor Chaotic Eclipse being prominently featured. Key vulnerabilities included CVE-2026-5490 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-25203 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-34054 (CVSS 7.8), and CVE-2026-5424 (CVSS 7.8). These security flaws posed a global risk, particularly affecting the education, digital signage, enterprise, government, and healthcare sectors.
